justification: The question pertains specifically to the future stock price performance of a publicly traded corporation on a major stock exchange.
question:
Will MCK's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2025-12-21?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
